name: Statamic
description: Laravel-powered flat-file CMS with optional database support and beautiful control panel

description.value: Laravel-powered flat-file CMS with optional database support and beautiful control panel

license.comment: Custom license - free for personal use, $275/site for commercial Pro license

cms-type.comment: Supports both traditional templated sites and headless API delivery via REST and GraphQL

deployment-model.comment: Self-hosted only; no managed cloud offering from Statamic

database-support.comment: Flat-file by default (YAML/Markdown), but supports database drivers via Laravel's Eloquent. Can start flat-file and switch to database as needed

api-type.comment: Both REST API and GraphQL available; Pro license required

multi-tenancy.comment: Multi-site support for multiple languages, domains, or sub-brands from one installation; Pro feature

static-site-generation.comment: Official SSG addon generates static HTML for deployment to Netlify, Vercel, etc.

edge-deployment.comment: Static site output can be deployed to any CDN/edge platform

content-types.comment: Collections and Blueprints allow defining custom content structures

custom-fields.comment: 40+ built-in fieldtypes; custom fieldtypes can be created

field-types.comment: Includes Bard (block editor), Replicator (repeater), assets, code, markdown, table, video, and many more

content-relationships.comment: Relationship fieldtype for linking entries; taxonomies for categorization

nested-components.comment: Bard editor supports modular content blocks; Replicator fieldtype for repeatable component sets

localization.comment: Multi-site with per-field localization; Pro feature

content-validation.comment: Field validation rules via Laravel's validation system

embedded-interactives.comment: Bard editor can embed custom Vue components and interactive blocks

content-versioning.comment: Revisions feature tracks content history with restore capability; Pro feature

draft-publish.comment: Working copy system separates drafts from published content; Pro feature

scheduled-publishing.comment: Entries can be scheduled for future publication via date field

approval-workflows.comment: No built-in multi-step approval workflow; basic publish permissions only

content-locking.comment: No built-in content locking for concurrent editing prevention

audit-logging.comment: Revisions track who changed what; Enterprise tier includes full audit logging

media-library.comment: Asset browser with search, sort, rename, preview, and metadata editing

image-transformations.comment: Glide library integration for on-the-fly resize, crop, and filters

external-media-storage.comment: Supports S3, SFTP, and other Flysystem adapters via Laravel's filesystem

video-support.comment: Video fieldtype for embedding; video file uploads supported

svg-support.comment: SVG upload with automatic sanitization for security

folder-organization.comment: Asset containers with folder structure for organization

role-based-access.comment: Roles and user groups for permission management; Pro feature for unlimited users

sso-saml.comment: OAuth via Laravel Socialite (Google, GitHub, etc.); no native SAML support. Enterprise tier mentions SSO/2FA

team-collaboration.comment: User groups, collaborative editing features; Pro feature

audience-restrictions.comment: Content can be restricted by user roles and permissions

typescript-sdk.comment: No official TypeScript SDK; PHP-based with REST/GraphQL APIs consumable from any language

content-type-sdk.comment: Blueprints can be defined in YAML files (code-first); PHP addon development supported

cli-tools.comment: Extensive CLI via 'php please' command with 40+ commands for installation, content, and development

local-development.comment: Full local development environment; flat-file nature makes setup simple

webhooks.comment: Event system allows triggering external services; Laravel's event listeners and observers

plugin-system.comment: Rich addon ecosystem with fieldtypes, tags, modifiers, widgets, and more

admin-ui-customization.comment: Control panel customization via Vue components, widgets, and white-labeling (Pro)

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with comprehensive guides, API reference, video tutorials, and active community

frontend-frameworks.comment: Works with any framework via REST/GraphQL APIs; Astro has official docs integration, Gatsby has community guide

search-integration.comment: Built-in local search driver (Comb) plus Algolia integration

preview-mode.comment: Live Preview built into control panel for real-time content editing

ecommerce-integration.comment: E-commerce addons available in marketplace; Snipcart integration popular

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; third-party integrations via addons or manual implementation

ai-features.comment: No built-in AI features; may be available via third-party addons

cdn-included.comment: Self-hosted; CDN must be configured separately

response-caching.comment: Static caching, API response caching (60 min default), and full-page cache support

rate-limits.comment: Default 60 requests/minute for API; fully configurable

global-regions.comment: Self-hosted only; deploy to any region you choose

free-tier.comment: Core version free forever (1 admin user, limited features); Pro features require license

open-source.comment: Source available but not OSS; custom Statamic License (free for personal, paid for commercial)

pricing-model.comment: Core free; Pro $275/site (includes 1 year updates, then $65/year); Enterprise custom pricing

commercial-support.comment: Pro includes basic developer support (2-3 day response); Enterprise includes premium support with SLA

enterprise-features.comment: Enterprise tier with SSO, 2FA, audit logging, SLA, custom procurement, and priority support
